item.title: Hot Diggity Dump
item.description:
A standard beef hot dog is 190 calories, offers 7 grams or protein and 30 percent of our Daily Value of Vitamin B12, a crucial nutrient for normal metabolism, brain development in children and mental clarity in adults.
A hot dog is not a sandwich.
During peak hot dog season, from Memorial Day to Labor Day, Americans are expected to consume 7 billion hot dogs.
Frankfurt, Germany claims to be the originator of the hot dog and celebrated the hot dog’s 500th birthday in 1987.
Hot dogs are an approved space food. They were one of the first foods eaten on the moon!
In 2018, consumers spent more than $3 billion on hot dogs in U.S. supermarkets.
Hot dog ambassadors exist. As does the National Hot Dog and Sausage Council.
There is a right way and a wrong way to eat a hot dog.
It's true! See here: https://www.hot-dog.org/culture/hot-dog-etiquette
NHDSC hot dog etiquette states that ketchup should not be used on a hot dog for anyone over the age of 18.
NHDSC also states that condiments remaining on the fingers after eating a hot dog should be licked away, not washed.
In 1867, Charles Feltman began serving hot dogs in Coney Island. They have been an American favorite ever since.
“Hot dogs are meant to be enjoyed -- not weaponized." was ESPNs quote of the year after the National Hot Dog and Sausage Council reacted to a fan throwing a hot dog at Tiger Woods during an event.
The most expensive hot dog cost $2300 USD.
The world record for hot dog eating is 76.
Franks and wieners were the original names for the Americanized hot dogs.
'Glizzy' is the newest term for a wiener, for no apparent reason.
Soviet Premier Nikita Khrushchev ate a hot dog during the first visit of a Soviet Premier to the US in 1959 and admitted that Americans had the Soviets beat at sausage making.
In 2019, more than 2,000 pounds of Vienna Beef hot dogs were recalled because they may have contained metal fragments.
Paige, look! It's the worlds longest hot dog! It was approximately 103 bananas long.
On Independence Day, Americans are expected to enjoy 150 million hot dogs, enough to stretch from D.C. to L.A. more than five times.
My DMs immediately after posting this dump, probably.
item.dc:creator: haIucid

item.title: MRW my financial planner says I no longer have to work for the rest of my life
item.description: Retiring at 59 on May 31, and I could not be fucking happier. Well, maybe if I was this dog! *Edit: thanks for all the kind words! I don't normally post personal stuff here, but I thought this was a bit more important than my cake day! :)
item.dc:creator: LosPer

item.title: SecretHarpy's Meme Library: Volume 21
item.description:
Hello and good evening my imgur friends. Welcome to yet another meme dump. My brain is too fuzzy right now for clever introduction commentary, but you guys don't care because you're only here for the funny stuff. Onward, to said funny stufff!
shit they got me too, I fucken love cheese
this is correct
Any positions open? I would like to apply
you deserve it
time to read the ingredients of every nearby bathroom product
FEED ME THE PAIN SALT
...yeah
*boink*
That's all for this one folks. See you in the next dump and til' then, stay awesome imgur
item.dc:creator: SecretHarpy

item.title: The 423rd vol. of "I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps -- Kids Are The Future ep 3
item.description:
STAY TUNED! I'll be releasing more MeeMays back into the wild *every other* Monday-Friday around 11:30 am, GMT-5, in my ""I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so that I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps" Or use Imgur's "Follow" Feature, which will alert you whenever one of my dumps goes Viral.
He's not wrong
Alabama?
My SIL wouldn't let me buy this for the nephews
She made the right choice
THEY YEARN FOR THE MINES
The question only changes to "Do you wanna go for a walk?!"
The main part I remember is all the boys immediately strip down to their underwear. Am I gay? Maybe a little. Did I know it then? Maybe a little.
This is my newly commissioned Signature Image, by Dark Arts Studios. He's no longer on The Imgurs, I met him on ElbowDeepInAHorse's Discord Server. Here's where you can see his work: https://twitter.com/Anubis23342060 https://www.furaffinity.net/user/thed4rk1ord/ https://tailsofthegods.com/ https://dark-arts.itch.io/ FUN TIP / LIFE FACT / PRO HACK I upvote 90% - 99% of positive or neutral comments on my posts, as well as ≈50% of negative ones Shoutout to my fellow Dumpers: @DeafKitten @CodyBurkett @OhValleyOfPlenty @AbbiiStabbii @DigiT00l @MemeMuseumCurator @CeleryMan7 @DumpsterKoala @JebidiahBeetus @Kaeldra @KirbyVictorious @HermioneDanger00 @DumpReview @WhiskeyJelly @JasonPositivityPilot @danat101 @PotatoCheesMonk @VanessaNelson @NotMuchBiggerThanAWomprat @MindNumbingBraIncAndy @TheMellowMoron @TheWoodsAreVile @ThatOtherGirlYouKnow @IStealMemesAndStuff @DrWalters @DaymanAhAAAAah Lemme know If you are a Regular Dumper and would like to be added to the list! Archive Of Previous Dumps: Vols 1-300: https://imgur.com/a/vAfF9Wz Vols 301+ : https://imgur.com/a/oDakPaq Updated Whenever I Can Get Around To It #MemeDump #Children #Kids #MeeMays #AdolfHitlerSchoolForTheArts #TheWhoring20s #SaveTheBEEEEEES #BeeLM #SaveTheBees #JettfreyEpsfuelCandnt #CommeltSteelBeamicide #WhatIfNobodyShotJFK #AndHisHeadJustDidThat #EatingAppsTakingNaps #EatNamesAndTakeAss #MasturbatingIsNecrophilia #IfYoureDeadInside #DumpyMcGeeAndGuyNamedSteve #2Dumps1Site #AllTiddiesAreGoodTiddies #FreeTheNipple
item.dc:creator: PyroDragon

item.title: I dream of a better world

item.title: I am suffering, you shall suffer with me
item.description:
I've learned not to believe it's over. Keep the ugly ones in circulation for a couple days just to be safe
That's the dream
I will never apologize
I actually stress started myself early. Stupid work. And Life.
Pregnancy would be very worrisome. I'm single, ace and haven't know the touch of a man for many moons.
Soo much cramping
It's all of the above.
item.dc:creator: LogicKitty

item.title: I see this as an absolute win!
item.description: I have no place in my life for mirthless people and wish them the best of luck in all their future endeavors. I definitely played a roll in imgur crashing yesterday by posting a couple dozen rick rolls but hey, that's what April 1st is for!
item.dc:creator: ahorseelbowdeepinme

item.title: I PAINTED THIS PAINTING OF MICHELANGELO'S DAVID!
item.description: I painted this oil painting on a wooden panel. It's a portrait of the famous sculpture David of Michelangelo. I already sold this painting so it's not available anymore. :) If this is the first time you come across me, I'm a 21-year-old, self-taught artist who just started studying fine arts at the fine arts academy so if you'd like to support me, make sure to follow me! Thank you all very much for all fo your support and special thanks to all of you who donate to support me. Both the ones who donate monthly on patreon, and the ones to who donate one-time donations via PayPal. It couldn't mean more to me and it helps a lot! Thank you all so much! You can support me with a one-time donation here: https://www.paypal.me/anisjerbi Or with a monthly donation here: https://www.patreon.com/Anis_Jerbi_art If you'd like to see all of my artworks, you can via my official website: https://www.anisjerbi.com and if you'd like to commission an artwork from me or purchase one of my artworks (like this one), let me know by sending me a dm, a comment under this post or by contacting me via my official website: anisjerbi.com Alright, I love you all and see you all in the comments, DM's, etc. You name it. :) I'm sorry for neglecting Imgur lately but I've been extremely busy with work and studies and the video size errors on here did not help.
item.dc:creator: AnisJerbi
